lightweight.description: Docs/research class tasks require lighter validation and may mark tests/diff review as not applicable when visible evidence exists.

standard.description: Normal implementation/config changes require validator-backed proof for acceptance, tests, diff review, and evidence.

strict.description: Safety/autonomy-sensitive tasks require validator-backed proof plus the same explicit checklist coverage, with manual override remaining visible and exceptional.

notes: lighter validation is allowed because runtime tests are often not relevant
docs-only work may use reviewer-backed validation instead of validator-worker proof
tests and diff review may be marked not_applicable when justified
normal code/config changes require validator-backed proof before done
runtime safety or autonomy-sensitive changes require the strict tier
manual override should remain exceptional and explicit
